hooks.command: HUB=/Users/kyusikkim/projects/playbook; SYNC=~/.claude/.moneyballscore-hub-sync; CUR=$(cd $HUB 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); LAST=$(cat $SYNC 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CUR" ] && [ "$CUR" != "$LAST" ]; then if [ -n "$LAST" ]; then N=$(cd $HUB && git log --oneline $LAST..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "🔔 허브 갱신 ${N}건 (${LAST:0:7} → ${CUR:0:7}) — 새 정책/메모리 적용됨"; else echo "🔔 허브 sync init (${CUR:0:7})"; fi; echo $CUR > $SYNC; fi

ISSUES=$(gh issue list --label hub-update --state open --limit 5 --json number,title --jq '.[] | "  #\(.number) \(.title)"' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then COUNT=$(echo "$ISSUES" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "📬 hub-update open issues (${COUNT}건) — /develop-cycle Step 0 또는 manual 흡수:"; echo "$ISSUES"; fi
case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'git commit'*) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm run type-check 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'TYPE_CHECK_FAILED: 커밋 전 타입 체크 실패. 에러를 수정하세요.' ;; esac
case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push'*) echo '✅ Push 완료. /compound 실행하여 회고 + CHANGELOG + 메모리를 업데이트하세요.' ;; esac
